CAIRO: Leave that little one alone.

It seems to be a journal of some sorts. It's titled "My Research".
\"CAIRO: I've lived in Neverwinter for m: "CAIRO: I've lived in Neverwinter for most of my life, but in the past few years I've sensed something dark.
I've followed the scent and it's left me: I've followed the scent and it's left me on Route 4.
I've encountered a narcissistic red hair: I've encountered a narcissistic red haired woman who seemed to be messing with something in the ground.
She was speaking about how her \"experim: She was speaking about how her "experimentation" with Rift Matter started to produce a special type of Pokémon called "Shadow Pokémon".
The Dens on the ground would absorb near: The Dens on the ground would absorb nearby Pokémon into it and shroud it with darkness.
When they re-emerged from the ground, a: When they re-emerged from the ground, a shadowy aura would surround the Pokémon."
\"I've driven off the woman many times,: "I've driven off the woman many times, and soon enough she never returned.
Subsequently, I've tried to destroy the: Subsequently, I've tried to destroy the Dens, but even for me that seems impossible.
The best I can do is find a way to purif: The best I can do is find a way to purify the Dens completely...
In the meantime, rescuing Pokémon using: In the meantime, rescuing Pokémon using Rift Fragments seems to do just fine.
It's a hassle, but it's not without its: It's a hassle, but it's not without its rewards.
\\c[6]Pokémon found in dens with a blue: \c[6]Pokémon found in dens with a blue beam seems to have different attributes.
When purified, I've observed that some P: When purified, I've observed that some Pokémon could use moves that are normally impossible for them to know.
It seems that the narcissist did her bes: It seems that the narcissist did her best to change the DNA structures of anything that fell into her experiment."

I would say to make yourself at home, bu: I would say to make yourself at home, but I value my personal space.
Trying my best to enjoy myself here in A: Trying my best to enjoy myself here in Akuwa Town again, but...
